englishDefinitions: A situation, plan, or system that is very weak and likely to fail.
A structure that depends on every part staying in place, so if one part falls, everything may collapse.
persianTranslation: چیزی که با یک ضربه فرو می‌ریزد
examples: The company’s finances were a house of cards.
Without his support, their plan turned into a house of cards.
One mistake was enough to make the whole project collapse like a house of cards.
